# hf-bedrock-map

> A daily-refreshed mapping between Hugging Face model repositories and the
> models Amazon Bedrock can serve across the US regions. Answers: "is the HF
> model I'm about to self-host already available on Bedrock on demand?"

## What this is

- Enumerates Bedrock's native serverless foundation models
  (bedrock:ListFoundationModels) plus the Bedrock Marketplace subset of the
  SageMaker JumpStart hub (@capability:bedrock_console).
- Unions the four US regions (us-east-1, us-east-2, us-west-1, us-west-2); the
  catalog varies by region. Each entry records which of these regions serve it.
- Resolves each entry to a Hugging Face repo where evidence supports it.
- Regenerated daily and served as static files (no backend, permissive CORS).

## Match-status levels (field name: "confidence")

- confirmed   — HF repo linked by AWS itself (model-card EULA / JumpStart doc /
                verified override). Authoritative.
- validated   — AWS gives no HF link; repo inferred from the modelId and
                confirmed to exist under the provider's HF org.
- ambiguous   — on HF, but multiple variants exist and the modelId can't say
                which is served (candidates listed in the entry's "evidence").
- proprietary — closed-weight provider; no public HF equivalent by design.
- unresolved  — on Bedrock, but no HF repo determinable.

## Data and API (all static JSON, CORS: *)

- Full forward mapping: https://scttfrdmn.github.io/hf-bedrock-map/mapping.json
- Reverse index (HF id -> Bedrock): https://scttfrdmn.github.io/hf-bedrock-map/api/v1/index.json
- Per-model reverse lookup (case-insensitive):
  GET https://scttfrdmn.github.io/hf-bedrock-map/api/v1/hf/{org}/{repo}.json
  -> 200 with details if served by Bedrock, 404 if not.
  Example: /api/v1/hf/qwen/qwen3-32b.json

## Programmatic use

To check whether a Hugging Face repo is on Bedrock, lowercase the id and GET the
per-model endpoint; treat 404 as "not served". For bulk/offline checks,
download index.json once (keys are lowercased HF ids) and look up locally.

## More

- API reference and client snippets: https://github.com/scttfrdmn/hf-bedrock-map/blob/main/docs/API.md
- Source and README: https://github.com/scttfrdmn/hf-bedrock-map
- License: Apache-2.0
